response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription Match: Transcribed the concert MC segment and initial singing line manually based on clear Japanese audio. 2. Reference Usage: The reference JSON did not have lyrics or a full transcript; manual transcription and translation were carried out for the entire clip. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize with the VTuber's rapid speech, stumbles, and audience cheers, with an on-screen visual translation for the ending title card.

subtitles.original: そして、2階席！
subtitles.english: And then, the second floor seats!

subtitles.original: 1階席！
subtitles.english: The first floor seats!

subtitles.original: いぇーい！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、またペンライト遊んじゃおう！
subtitles.english: Let's play with the penlights again!

subtitles.original: 左の人、緑！
subtitles.english: People on the left, green!

subtitles.original: 右の人は、じゃ、オレンジ！
subtitles.english: And people on the right, orange!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、真ん中は...
subtitles.english: Then, in the middle...

subtitles.original: 青ー！
subtitles.english: Blue!

subtitles.original: おおー、綺麗だー！
subtitles.english: Wow, so beautiful!

subtitles.original: みんな、今回はね、こんな感じで、みんなも演出に参加しちゃうライブになっているよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, this time, it's a concert where you can all participate in the production like this!

subtitles.original: みんなで楽しんでいこうね！
subtitles.english: Let's all have fun together!

subtitles.original: 今日は、みんなも主役なんだ！
subtitles.english: Today, all of you are the main characters too!

subtitles.original: いぇーい！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 美味しい、美味しい。美味しいから、
subtitles.english: It's delicious, delicious. Since it's delicious...

subtitles.original: 夜はね、いっぱい動くと思って。まあ、もう動いてるけど、昼から飲めばよかった。
subtitles.english: I thought I'd move around a lot tonight—well, I'm already moving—so I should've drank it since the afternoon.

subtitles.original: スポドリ一択！
subtitles.english: Sports drink is the only choice!

subtitles.original: がっつり。今年の目標みたいに、ムキムキになっていこうと思います。
subtitles.english: Fully. I'm planning to get muscular, just like this year's goal.

subtitles.original: がんばれ！
subtitles.english: Do your best!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、初めての人！
subtitles.english: So, anyone here for the first time?

subtitles.original: あ、着席、着席してくれてありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Ah, thank you for sitting down.

subtitles.original: 一番最初のライブから全部来てるよっていう人いる？
subtitles.english: Is there anyone here who has been to every single concert since the very first one?

subtitles.original: おー！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Oh! Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: というわけでね、みんな分かったね？初めましての人も、いつもはそらともじゃない人も、
subtitles.english: So, everyone, you get it now, right? Those who are here for the first time, those who aren't usually Soratomo,

subtitles.original: そして昔から応援してる人、みんな集まって、みんなが全員そらともだよ！みんな楽しく過ごしていこうね！
subtitles.english: and those who have supported me for a long time—everyone gathered here is a Soratomo! Let's all have a fun time together!

subtitles.original: というわけで、なんと、YouTubeでも無料配信...
subtitles.english: So, amazingly, we also have a free stream on YouTube...

subtitles.original: あ、私全部言ってないのに。ふふふ。ここ、まだ来たばっかり？まだ来たばっかりかと思うけど、
subtitles.english: Ah, I haven't said everything yet. Hehe. You guys just got here? I know you just got here, but...

subtitles.original: 続きは概要欄から、え、え、え、え、い、家（いえ）の人はどうすれば...
subtitles.english: ...the rest is from the description... wait, wait, what about the people at home?

subtitles.original: あ、コメント会場、配信会場の人も楽しんでいってね！わーい！
subtitles.english: Ah, those in the comment section and stream viewers, please keep enjoying it! Yay!

subtitles.original: それでは、もう一回飲んでから行くね。ちょっと水分も大事。
subtitles.english: Now then, I'll take one more drink before we go. Hydration is important, after all.

subtitles.original: 助かる？助かってくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: A lifesaver? Thanks for being saved!

subtitles.original: では、次の曲も楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: Now then, please enjoy the next song too!

subtitles.original: まだもうちょっとだけでいいから...
subtitles.english: Just a little bit more is fine, so...

subtitles.original: 冒頭無料配信はこちらで終了です。
subtitles.english: [Text: The free preview stream ends here.]
